attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SNHDS.BATCH_ID, SNHDS.HOLD_DETAIL_ID,  SNHDS.SO_HEADER_ID, SNHDS.SO_LINE_ID, SNHDS.REASON_CODE, SNHDS.SO_ACCOUNTING_RULE, SNHDS.IS_SPLIT, SNHDS.EITF_PCT, SNHDS.SOP_PCT, SNHDS.ELEMENT_TYPE, SNHDS.ACTION, SNHDS.SO_LINE_AMT, SNHDS.ELEMENT_AMT, SNHDS.RC_RANK, SNHDS.PRIORITY, SNHDS.DATASET_NUMBER, SNHDS.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE, SNHDS.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED, SNHDS.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED_P, SNHDS.ELEMENT_PCT_AVAILABLE, SNHDS.UNFUNDED, SNHDS.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT, SNHDS.ELEMENT_RELEASE_AMT, SNHDS.USAGE_PCT, SNHDS.RECLASS_PCT, SNHDS.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT, SNHDS.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT, SNHDS.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED, SNHDS.RAE_PCT, SNHDS.RAE_PROCESS_FLAG, SNHDS.RAE_POSTED, SNHDS.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID, SNHDS.CATEOGORY_ID, SNHDS.INHERITED_FLAG, SNHDS.ORG_ID, SNHDS.STATUS_CODE, SNHDS.FISCAL_PERIOD, SNHDS.START_PERIOD, SNHDS.INVOICE_HOLD, SNHDS.GLOBAL_HIERARCHY, SNHDS.APPLY_FUTURE_TRXS, SNHDS.DEFER_IMMD, SNHDS.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_AMT, SNHDS.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_AMT, SNHDS.INHERITED_FRM_HDR_ID, SNHDS.INHERITED_FRM_LN_ID, SNHDS.PROFILE_ID, SNHDS.TEMPLATE_ID, SNHDS.TEMPLATE_NAME, SNHDS.REASON_CODE_ID, SNHDS.STARTING_POINT, SNHDS.SRC_ID, SNHDS.GLOBAL_NAME, SNHDS.HOLD_INTERFACE_ID, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE1, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE2, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE3, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE4, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE5, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE6, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE7, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE8, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE9, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE10, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE11, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE12, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE13, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE14, SNHDS.ATTRIBUTE15, SNHDS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SNHDS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SNHDS.CREATED_BY, SNHDS.CREATION_DATE, SNHDS.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SNHDS.ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS SNHDS
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 
1
FROM  $$WORKDB.W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD WNHD
WHERE WNHD.SK_HOLD_DETAIL_ID_INT= SNHDS.HOLD_DETAIL_ID )

SELECT 
SNHD.DATASET_NUMBER 	AS		BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_GRP_ID_INT, 
SNHD.ELEMENT_TYPE 		AS 		BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,     
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	 AS 		BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT 	 AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,

(CASE WHEN SNHD.SOP_PCT > 0 THEN  'SOP-97-2' 
            WHEN SNHD.EITF_PCT > 0 THEN  'EITF-08-01' 
END) AS BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY		AS		SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,      
(CASE WHEN SNHD.RAE_PCT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SNHD.RAE_PCT END)				AS		RAE_ADJUSTMENT_PCT,            
(CASE WHEN SNHD.INVOICE_HOLD	IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNHD.INVOICE_HOLD END) 	AS		INVOICE_HOLD_FLG,             
(CASE WHEN SNHD.IS_SPLIT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNHD.IS_SPLIT END)			AS		SPLIT_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_FLG,    
(CASE WHEN SNHD.DEFER_IMMD	IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNHD.DEFER_IMMD END)		AS		RSN_CD_DEFER_IMMDTLY_FLG ,     
(CASE WHEN SNHD.TEMPLATE_NAME	IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE SNHD.TEMPLATE_NAME END)	AS		TEMPLATE_ADJUSTMENT_NAME ,     
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ACTION	IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE SNHD.ACTION END)			AS		USER_SPECIFIED_RSN_ACTION_CD,  
0 ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_HOLD_PCT,
(CASE WHEN SNHD.STARTING_POINT IS NULL  THEN -999 ELSE  SNHD.STARTING_POINT END)		AS		RSN_CD_STARTING_POINT_NUM_INT ,
(CASE WHEN SNHD.RC_RANK IS NULL THEN -9 ELSE SNHD.RC_RANK END)					AS		RSN_CD_RANKING_NUM_INT ,       
(CASE WHEN SNHD.PRIORITY	IS NULL THEN -9 ELSE SNHD.PRIORITY	END)				AS		RSN_CD_PRIORITY_NUM_INT ,      
(CASE WHEN SNHD.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE SNHD.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED END)  AS		TOTAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,        
(CASE WHEN SNHD.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE SNHD.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT END)	  	       AS		TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_PRVSN_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN SNHD.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE	SNHD.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT END)	       AS		TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_DFRRD_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN SNHD.RECLASS_PCT	 IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE SNHD.RECLASS_PCT END)				       AS   		ACTUAL_RECLASS_PCT ,           
(CASE WHEN SNHD.USAGE_PCT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SNHD.USAGE_PCT	 END )					AS		ACTUAL_USAGE_PCT  ,            
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT	 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SNHD.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT END)	AS		ACTUAL_RELEASED_PCT,           
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED	IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE  SNHD.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED	END)	AS		ACTUAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,       
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SNHD.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE END)	AS 		REQUESTED_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN SNHD.CREATION_DATE IS NULL THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE SNHD.CREATION_DATE 	END)		AS		SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,            
SNHD.HOLD_DETAIL_ID 		AS		SK_HOLD_DETAIL_ID_INT ,        
COALESCE(SNSAS.VSOE_ACCT_SCOPE,SNSAS_PAR.VSOE_ACCT_SCOPE)		AS		SRC_RPTD_VSOE_ACCNTNG_SCP_CD , 
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)	 	AS 		RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,                     
(CASE WHEN SNHD.PROFILE_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SNHD.PROFILE_ID END) 			AS		CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT ,          
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD	AS		CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBRSN_CD,     
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT	 AS	CCRM_ADJUST_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(SNSAS.LINE_TYPE,SNSAS_PAR.LINE_TYPE)				AS		CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD ,    
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNHD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNHD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SNHD.ACTION_CODE,
'I'
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS SNHD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON SNHD.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNHD.REASON_CODE_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNHD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA ON (SNHD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AND NRA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON (SNHD.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_PAR ON (NSOL_PAR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE SNSAS ON (  SNSAS.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND  SNSAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE SNSAS_PAR ON (  SNSAS_PAR.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL_PAR.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND  SNSAS_PAR.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
WHERE
(  COALESCE( SNHD.EITF_PCT, 0) >0  OR
    COALESCE( SNHD.SOP_PCT,0) >0
)
UNION ALL

SELECT 
ENHD.DATASET_NUMBER 	AS		BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_GRP_ID_INT, 
ENHD.ELEMENT_TYPE 		AS 		BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,     
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	 AS 		BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT 	 AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,

(CASE WHEN ENHD.SOP_PCT > 0 THEN  'SOP-97-2' 
            WHEN ENHD.EITF_PCT > 0 THEN  'EITF-08-01' 
END) AS BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY		AS		SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,       

(CASE WHEN ENHD.RAE_PCT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ENHD.RAE_PCT END)				AS		RAE_ADJUSTMENT_PCT,            
(CASE WHEN ENHD.INVOICE_HOLD	IS NULL THEN '=' ELSE ENHD.INVOICE_HOLD END) 	AS		INVOICE_HOLD_FLG ,             
(CASE WHEN ENHD.IS_SPLIT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ENHD.IS_SPLIT END)			AS		SPLIT_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_FLG,    
(CASE WHEN ENHD.DEFER_IMMD	IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ENHD.DEFER_IMMD END)		AS		RSN_CD_DEFER_IMMDTLY_FLG ,     
(CASE WHEN ENHD.TEMPLATE_NAME	IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE ENHD.TEMPLATE_NAME END)	AS		TEMPLATE_ADJUSTMENT_NAME ,     
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ACTION	IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE ENHD.ACTION END)			AS		USER_SPECIFIED_RSN_ACTION_CD,  
0 ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_HOLD_PCT,
(CASE WHEN ENHD.STARTING_POINT IS NULL  THEN -999 ELSE  ENHD.STARTING_POINT END)		AS		RSN_CD_STARTING_POINT_NUM_INT ,
(CASE WHEN ENHD.RC_RANK IS NULL THEN -9 ELSE ENHD.RC_RANK END)					AS		RSN_CD_RANKING_NUM_INT ,       
(CASE WHEN ENHD.PRIORITY	IS NULL THEN -9 ELSE ENHD.PRIORITY	END)				AS		RSN_CD_PRIORITY_NUM_INT ,      
(CASE WHEN ENHD.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE ENHD.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED END)  AS		TOTAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,        
(CASE WHEN ENHD.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE ENHD.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT END)	  	       AS		TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_PRVSN_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN ENHD.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE	ENHD.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT END)	       AS		TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_DFRRD_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN ENHD.RECLASS_PCT	 IS NULL THEN  0 ELSE ENHD.RECLASS_PCT END)				       AS   		ACTUAL_RECLASS_PCT ,           
(CASE WHEN ENHD.USAGE_PCT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ENHD.USAGE_PCT	 END )					AS		ACTUAL_USAGE_PCT  ,            
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT	 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ENHD.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT END)	AS		ACTUAL_RELEASED_PCT,           
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED	IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE  ENHD.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED	END)	AS		ACTUAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,       
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ENHD.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE END)	AS 		REQUESTED_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT,    
(CASE WHEN ENHD.CREATION_DATE IS NULL THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE ENHD.CREATION_DATE 	END)		AS		SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,            
ENHD.HOLD_DETAIL_ID 		AS		SK_HOLD_DETAIL_ID_INT ,        
COALESCE(SNSAS.VSOE_ACCT_SCOPE,SNSAS_PAR.VSOE_ACCT_SCOPE)		AS		SRC_RPTD_VSOE_ACCNTNG_SCP_CD , 
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)	 	AS 		RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,                     
(CASE WHEN ENHD.PROFILE_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE ENHD.PROFILE_ID END) 			AS		CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT ,          
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD	AS		CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBRSN_CD,     
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT	 AS	CCRM_ADJUST_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(SNSAS.LINE_TYPE,SNSAS_PAR.LINE_TYPE)				AS		CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD ,      
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN ENHD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  END) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN ENHD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ENHD.ACTION_CODE,
'I'
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS ENHD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON ENHD.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (ENHD.REASON_CODE_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (ENHD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA ON (ENHD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AND NRA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON (ENHD.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_PAR ON (NSOL_PAR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE SNSAS ON (  SNSAS.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND  SNSAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE SNSAS_PAR ON (  SNSAS_PAR.SO_LINE_ID = NSOL_PAR.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND  SNSAS_PAR.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE
(  COALESCE( ENHD.EITF_PCT, 0) >0  OR
    COALESCE( ENHD.SOP_PCT,0) >0
)
